data.name: DeliverableNotFound
data.value: Deliverable not found

data.name: DeliverableIdMismatch
data.value: Deliverable ID mismatch

data.name: UnexpectedUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the deliverable.

data.name: GenericServerError
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: FileRequired
data.value: File is required.

data.name: ContractNotFound
data.value: Contract not found

data.name: DesignateMaxLength
data.value: Designate cannot be over 100 characters

data.name: DesignateEmailMaxLength
data.value: Designate email cannot be over 100 characters

data.name: DesignateEmailInvalid
data.value: Designate email must be a valid email address (someuser@someserver.com)

data.name: DesignatePhoneInvalid
data.value: Designate phone must be a valid phone number (123-456-7890)

data.name: DesignatePhoneMaxLength
data.value: Designate phone cannot be over 30 characters

data.name: DeliverableTypeCodeNumeric
data.value: Deliverable type code must be numeric.

data.name: DeliverableTypeCodeMaxLength
data.value: Deliverable type code cannot be over 5 digits

data.name: FiscalYearCodeMaxLength
data.value: Fiscal year code cannot be over 8 characters

data.name: FiscalYearCodeNumeric
data.value: Fiscal year code must be numeric.

data.name: ContractCodeMaxLength
data.value: Contract code cannot be over 32 characters

data.name: PortfolioCodeMaxLength
data.value: Portfolio code cannot be over 5 characters

data.name: PrimaryBuildingCodeMaxLength
data.value: Primary building code cannot be over 32 characters

data.name: SecondaryBuildingCodeMaxLength
data.value: Secondary building code cannot be over 32 characters

data.name: LeaseCodeMaxLength
data.value: Lease code cannot be over 8 characters

data.name: ProjectCodeMaxLength
data.value: Project code cannot be over 13 characters

data.name: MonthIdRange
data.value: Month Id must be between 1 and 12.

data.name: UsernameMinLength
data.value: Username must be 8 characters

data.name: UsernameMaxLength
data.value: Username cannot be over 30 characters

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be 8 characters

data.name: PasswordMaxLength
data.value: Password cannot be over 50 characters

data.name: LanguageInvalid
data.value: Language must be 1 for English or 2 for French. 0 will default to English

data.name: AttachmentNotFound
data.value: Attachment not found

data.name: AttachmentContentNotFound
data.value: Attachment content not found

data.name: FileTypeNotAllowed
data.value: File type not allowed

data.name: LoggedOutAndRefreshTokenInvalidated
data.value: Logged out and refresh token invalidated.

data.name: InvalidClientRequest
data.value: Invalid client request

data.name: InvalidAccessOrRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid access token or refresh token

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found

data.name: InvalidOrExpiredRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token

data.name: RefreshTokenRequired
data.value: Refresh token is required.

data.name: GenericProcessingError
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: DeliverableIdQueryParameterRequired
data.value: The deliverableId query parameter is required.

data.name: RequestBodyRequired
data.value: The request body is required.
